blockingIssues.description: Team metric introsApproved is attributed to intro.requester instead of intro.connector, violating per-connector semantics in VAL-ANALYTICS-008.
Team metric searchesPerformed assigns one global saved-search total to every user row instead of per-user values, violating team breakdown requirements.
Chrome extension quick-capture runtime still posts to /api/contacts and does not consume /api/extension/capture, so the extension-endpoint cross-area flow is not wired end-to-end.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align implementation-worker skill instructions with Relay mission boundaries (paths, ports, package names, and validation surfaces) to avoid forced worker deviations.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both analytics-dashboard and cross-area-flows reviews reported the same mismatch between implementation-worker skill guidance and mission AGENTS.md boundaries.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify whether query validation must always use shared Zod middleware or if controller-level inline validation is acceptable, and update conventions accordingly.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both reviews flagged route-validation convention drift: AGENTS states Zod middleware on query/params/body, while recent implementations use direct/inline query parsing on analytics and global search routes.

rejectedObservations.observation: Add relay/.factory/library/architecture.md because some worker procedures reference architecture docs.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous and non-blocking for scrutiny; no concrete defect pattern tied to milestone failures.
